settings.heading: Terms of Service
settings.intro: The terms that apply when you shop with Emporx.

settings.content:
Last updated: 2026. Please read these terms carefully. We recommend having them reviewed by a qualified professional for your specific obligations.

Overview

These Terms of Service govern your use of the Emporx store and your purchases. By accessing the site or placing an order, you agree to these terms. You must be at least 18 (or the age of majority where you live) and able to form a binding contract.

Orders & acceptance

Your order is an offer to buy. We may accept or decline any order, and we reserve the right to cancel an order and issue a refund — for example, if an item is out of stock or a pricing error occurs.

Pricing & product information

We work to keep prices, descriptions, images, and availability accurate, but errors can occur. Product colors and details may vary slightly from images due to your display and supplier variation. If we discover an error in the price or description of an item you ordered, we'll contact you and may correct it or cancel the order.

Shipping & delivery

Delivery time frames shown at checkout and on our Shipping Policy are estimates, not guarantees. Delivery may be affected by supplier processing, carrier delays, customs, or other factors outside our control. Title and risk of loss pass to you upon delivery to the carrier.

Returns & warranty

Returns are governed by our Returns & Refunds policy and warranty claims by our Warranty policy, which form part of these terms.

Payment

Payment is processed securely through our payment provider at checkout. Your order is confirmed once payment is authorized.

Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Emporx's total liability for any claim arising from your purchase will not exceed the amount you paid for the affected order. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Nothing in these terms limits rights you have under applicable consumer-protection law.

Product use & safety

Please use all products in accordance with the manufacturer's instructions and any included safety guidance — this is especially important for items such as chargers, batteries, and powered electronics. We are not responsible for damage or injury resulting from misuse, improper installation, or failure to follow manufacturer instructions.

Intellectual property

The Emporx name, store content, and design are owned by us or our licensors and may not be copied or used without permission.

Force majeure

We are not liable for delays or failures to perform caused by events beyond our reasonable control, including supplier or carrier disruptions, natural events, or government actions.

Severability & entire agreement

If any part of these terms is found unenforceable, the remaining terms stay in effect. These terms, together with our Privacy Policy, Shipping, Returns, and Warranty policies, form the entire agreement between you and Emporx regarding your use of the store.

Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Any dispute will be handled in the courts located in Florida, unless applicable law requires otherwise.

Changes

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the store after changes means you accept the updated terms.

Contact

Questions about these terms? Email Alvaro.herard@emporx.com or write to Emporx, 2011 51st Ter SW, Naples, FL 34116, United States.
